name: Beyond Air, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview We are a commercial-stage medical device and biopharmaceutical company developing a platform of nitric oxide (NO) generators and delivery systems (the LungFit platform) capable of generating NO from ambient air. The Companys first device, LungFit PH received premarket approval (PMA) from the FDA in June 2022. The NO generated by the LungFit PH system is indicated to improve oxygenation and reduce the need for extracorporeal membrane oxygenation in term and near-term (>34...
